server.name: PharmaCorp Laboratory
server.description: Database of 12,000 characterized molecules including chemical properties, toxicity profiles, and clinical trial results from phases 1 to 3.

tools.name: search_molecules
tools.description: Search molecules. Molecules characterized by the laboratory with their biological properties and clinical advancement.

ic50_nm.description: Half-maximal inhibitory concentration in nanomolars. Lower means more potent.

hepatotoxicity.description: Liver toxicity observed in preclinical trials

tools.name: get_molecules_by_id
tools.description: Get full details of a single molecules record by its identifier.
